description:

title: Sale in Lila: Gated Community | 5BR Villa | Prime Location | Property Finder
description:
Gated Community | 5BR Villa | Prime Location
Villa for sale in Lila, Arabian Ranches 2
Ayoub & Co. is delighted to offer this beautifully designed 5-bedroom villa in the highly desirable Lila District, Arabian Ranches 2. Nestled within a secure gated family community, this exceptional home combines generous living spaces, elegant finishes, and a prime internal location directly next to the pool and kids’ playground, making it the ideal residence for families seeking comfort and convenience.
Set for ready move-in by July, this villa presents a rare opportunity to own a premium home in one of Dubai’s most established suburban communities.
Why Choose Lila, Arabian Ranches 2?
- Prestigious Emaar Community – One of Dubai’s most sought-after villa neighborhoods.
- Family-Focused Lifestyle – Peaceful gated surroundings with parks, pools, and children’s play areas.
- Prime Internal Location – Situated next to the community pool and kids’ playground.
- Spacious Contemporary Layouts – Designed for comfortable family living with abundant natural light.
- Excellent Connectivity – Easy access to Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, schools, and retail centers.
Property Highlights:
* Type: 5 Bedroom Villa
* Bathrooms: 5
* Price: AED 7,400,000
* Community: Lila, Arabian Ranches 2
* Condition: Ready to Move in July
* Gated Community Living
* Next to Pool & Kids Playground
* Bright Spacious Interiors
* Private Garden & Family Outdoor Space
Property Amenities:
* Covered Parking
* Community Swimming Pool
* Kids Play Area
* Landscaped Parks & Walking Trails
* 24/7 Security
* Nearby Schools, Retail & Dining Options
* Family-Friendly Green Community
Located in the heart of Arabian Ranches 2, this villa in Lila offers the perfect blend of privacy, luxury, and family-oriented living. Whether for end use or long-term investment, this is a property that delivers both lifestyle and value.
Contact us now for more information!
Always Remember "You Are One Call Away!"

description:
4BR VILLA | LANDSCAPED GARDEN | UP FOR SALE
Villa for sale in Lila, Arabian Ranches 2
Seeniun Properties is proud to present this elegantly furnished 4-bedroom villa for sale located in the highly sought-after Lila community, Arabian Ranches 2. Designed with a blend of modern comfort and Arabian-inspired architecture, this home offers spacious living areas, refined interiors, and a tranquil family-oriented environment.
*Villa Highlights:
*4 Bedrooms
*Furnished
*4 Bathrooms
*Size: 4,359 sq. ft.
*Spacious living & dining areas
*Built In Wardrobe
*Contemporary open kitchen
*Private landscaped garden with side access
*2 Covered Parking
*Gated Community
*Rented
*Price: AED 6,700,000/-
Lila is an exclusive villa enclave within the prestigious Arabian Ranches 2 community, developed by Emaar Properties. Known as “the epitome of a lush getaway,” Lila combines Spanish-inspired architecture with a serene, family-oriented setting, making it a highly desirable address for residents seeking space, tranquility, and quality living in Dubai.
Arabian Ranches is one of Dubai’s most desirable family communities, masterfully developed by Emaar. Known for its lush green landscapes, tree-lined streets, and modern villas, it offers a tranquil suburban lifestyle while being only a short drive from central Dubai.
The community features:
- A selection of parks, playgrounds, and shaded walkways
- Community swimming pools and fitness facilities
- The Ranches Souk with retail, dining, and convenience stores
- A top-rated Ranches Primary School and nearby nurseries
- Medical clinics and pharmacies for family healthcare needs
- Easy access to major roads, connecting residents to Downtown Dubai, Business Bay, and Dubai Marina within 20–25 minutes
Overall, Lila offers a peaceful, safe, and community-focused lifestyle — an excellent choice for families and investors .
Contact us for further details and to arrange a viewing—an excellent opportunity for both end-users and investors in a high-demand community.

ARABIAN RANCHES 2 / ROSA
Your dream home awaits you!
